root.sql:
select sc_cls_mon_dep.monthly_date ,sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code ,sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_name
,( select count( 1 ) from sc_cls_mon_dep_accno where sc_cls_mon_dep_accno.monthly_date = PKA_SRV_DATETIME.fp_RelativeMonth( sc_cls_mon_dep.monthly_date , -1 ) and sc_cls_mon_dep_accno.deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code ) as count_bf
,( select sum( deposit_balance ) from sc_cls_mon_dep_accno where sc_cls_mon_dep_accno.monthly_date = PKA_SRV_DATETIME.fp_RelativeMonth( sc_cls_mon_dep.monthly_date , -1 ) and sc_cls_mon_dep_accno.deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code ) as bal_bf
, ( select count( 1 ) from sc_dep_t_deposit_slip ,sc_dep_m_creditor where sc_dep_t_deposit_slip.account_no = sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no and cancel_status = '0' and deposit_slip_type in ('OCA','DEP') and operate_date between PKA_SRV_DATETIME.fp_FirstDayOfMonth( sc_cls_mon_dep.monthly_date::date ) and sc_cls_mon_dep.monthly_date and sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code ) as count_dep
,coalesce( ( select sum( sc_dep_m_creditor_item.deposit_balance ) from sc_dep_m_creditor_item , sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type ,sc_dep_m_creditor where sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no = sc_dep_m_creditor_item.deposit_account_no and sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type.deposit_item_type = sc_dep_m_creditor_item.item_type and sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type.sign_flag = 1 and sc_dep_m_creditor_item.working_day between PKA_SRV_DATETIME.fp_FirstDayOfMonth( sc_cls_mon_dep.monthly_date::date ) and sc_cls_mon_dep.monthly_date and sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code ) , 0 ) as bal_dep
, ( select count( 1 ) from sc_dep_t_deposit_slip ,sc_dep_m_creditor where sc_dep_t_deposit_slip.account_no = sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no and cancel_status = '0' and deposit_slip_type not in ('OCA','DEP') and operate_date between PKA_SRV_DATETIME.fp_FirstDayOfMonth( sc_cls_mon_dep.monthly_date::date ) and sc_cls_mon_dep.monthly_date and sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code ) as count_withdraw
,coalesce( ( select sum( sc_dep_m_creditor_item.deposit_balance ) from sc_dep_m_creditor_item , sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type ,sc_dep_m_creditor where sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no = sc_dep_m_creditor_item.deposit_account_no and sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type.deposit_item_type = sc_dep_m_creditor_item.item_type and sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type.sign_flag = -1 and sc_dep_m_creditor_item.working_day between PKA_SRV_DATETIME.fp_FirstDayOfMonth( sc_cls_mon_dep.monthly_date::date ) and sc_cls_mon_dep.monthly_date and sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code ) , 0 ) as bal_withdraw
,count( 1 ) as count_fw ,sum( deposit_balance ) as bal_fw
, ( select interest_rate from sc_dep_m_int_step_rate where deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code and interest_rate > 0 and effective_date = ( select max(effective_date ) from sc_dep_m_int_step_rate where deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code and interest_rate > 0 ) ) as int_rate
from sc_cls_mon_dep ,sc_cls_mon_dep_accno ,sc_dep_m_rule where 1=1 and sc_cls_mon_dep.monthly_date = sc_cls_mon_dep_accno.monthly_date and sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code = sc_cls_mon_dep_accno.deposit_type_code and sc_dep_m_rule.cat_id = '0' -- บัญชีเงินของสมาชิก /*WHERE*/ --and sc_cls_mon_dep.monthly_date = '31/7/2019'
group by sc_cls_mon_dep.monthly_date ,sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code ,sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_name
order by sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code
